ServiceDefinition.description: Used by: Mashup: HPMC.Asset.Overview.MU to delete Asset
ServiceDefinition.name: DeleteAssetByThingnameAndLocationCaption

ServiceDefinition.description: Returns assets that matches the filter criteria.
ServiceDefinition.name: GetMachineAssetsFiltered

ServiceDefinition.description: show all assets with the option of filters
ServiceDefinition.name: QueryAllAssetsWithFilter

ServiceDefinition.description: show all assets with the option of filters
ServiceDefinition.name: QueryAllAssetsWithFilterCHKR

Row.code:
/* * @name hasGroupAssociatedAssets * @date 01.03.2022 * @author Marc Aurel Büttner * @param selectedGroup infotable * @return bool */
const result = !selectedGroup ? true : selectedGroup && selectedGroup.getRowCount() == 0 ? true : selectedGroup && selectedGroup.assets && selectedGroup.assets.getRowCount() > 0 ? true : false;
